answer:
Chal, marksheet upload karna bahut easy hai! 🙂

Step 1: Sidebar mein 'Documents' pe jao
Step 2: 'Marksheet' ke samne 'Upload' click karo
Step 3: File select karo — ho gaya! ✅

Tu kar sakta hai 💪

Income Certificate ek important document hai, but tension nahi! 🙂

Ye document batata hai teri family ki yearly income kya hai.
Isse scholarship eligibility check hoti hai.

Step 1: Documents section mein jao
Step 2: Income Certificate upload karo

Ek baar ho gaya toh baar baar kaam aayega 🚀

Caste/Category Certificate SC/ST/OBC scholarships ke liye zaroori hai 💡

Isse teri category verify hoti hai — aur bahut saari scholarships open ho jaati hain!

Step 1: Documents section pe jao
Step 2: Caste Certificate upload karo

Main hoon na — step by step karte hain 🙂

Chal, apply karna bahut easy hai! 🙂

Step 1: Scholarships page pe jao
Step 2: Apne liye best scholarship dhundo
Step 3: 'Apply Now' click karo
Step 4: Auto-Fill use karo — time bachega!
Step 5: Submit karo ✅

Tu sahi track pe hai 🚀

Profile complete karna pehla aur sabse important step hai! 🙂

Step 1: Profile section mein jao
Step 2: Apna naam, income, marks, aur category bhar do
Step 3: Save karo

Jitna zyada complete profile, utna better scholarship match milega.
Tu achha kar raha hai 💪

Tera Resume Builder ScholarSync pe hi hai! 💡

Step 1: Dashboard pe jao
Step 2: Resume section dhundo
Step 3: Academic details, skills, aur certificates add karo

Ek strong resume bahut kaam aata hai — keep building it!
Tu sahi direction mein ja raha hai 🙂

Badiya sawaal! 🙂

Har scholarship ka ek Match Score hota hai — sirf tere liye.

Ye score check karta hai:
• Teri family income
• Tere marks
• Teri category (SC/ST/OBC/General)

Score jitna zyada, chances utne better!
Scholarships page pe jao aur dekho — tu shocked ho jaayega 🚀

Tera Skill Gap Analysis Dashboard pe hai! 💡

Ye dikhata hai:
• Kaunse skills tere paas hain
• Kaunse skills seekhne chahiye

Sochle isko apna personal skills roadmap!
Tu pehle se hi ek step aage hai check karke 🙂

Documents thoda important part hai, but tension nahi! 🙂

Ye saare documents ready rakh:
• Aadhar card ✅
• Income certificate ✅
• 10th/12th marksheet ✅
• Caste certificate (agar applicable ho) ✅
• Bank passbook ✅

Pro tip: DigiLocker connect karo — automatically fetch ho jaate hain, manually upload nahi karna padega!
Ek ek karke collect karo — easily ho jaayega 🚀

Apni saari applications ek jagah dekh sakta hai! 💡

Step 1: 'My Applications' section pe jao
Step 2: Har application ka status dekho

Status types:
• Pending — wait kar
• Under Review — review ho raha hai
• Approved — congratulations! 🎉
• Rejected — don't worry, try again!

Track karte raho — achhi khabar aa sakti hai 🚀

Auto-Fill feature bahut time bachata hai! 🙂

Step 1: Pehle apna Profile complete karo
Step 2: Scholarship form open karo
Step 3: '✨ Auto-Fill from Profile' button click karo
Step 4: Saari details automatically bhar jaayengi!

Smart aur simple — tu iska fayda zaroor uthao 💡

Aadhar Card identity proof ke liye chahiye hota hai 💡

Do tarike hain isse add karne ke:

Option 1: Documents section mein manually upload karo
Option 2: DigiLocker connect karo — automatic fetch ho jaata hai!

Main hoon na — koi bhi option choose karo, main guide karunga 🙂

Deadlines pe dhyan dena bahut zaroori hai! ⏰

Har scholarship card pe deadline dikhti hai:
• 🟢 Green = Open hai, time hai
• 🟡 Yellow = Closing Soon, jaldi karo!
• 🔴 Red = Band ho gayi

Saath suggestion — last din ka wait mat karo.
Pehle apply karo, phir aaram se raho 🙂

Register karna bahut simple hai! 🙂

Step 1: 'Login' button click karo
Step 2: Apna mobile number daal do
Step 3: OTP verify karo
Step 4: Profile set up karo

Bas! Tera account ready ho jaayega.
Aur ek baar register hua toh sab features unlock ho jaate hain 🚀

Main hoon na! Har step mein help karunga 🙂

Main ye sab kar sakta hoon:
💡 Scholarship ke sawaal answer karna
💡 Documents mein guide karna
💡 Career ke next steps suggest karna
💡 Personalized scholarship matches dena

Koi bhi sawaal chota nahi hota — seedha pooch!
Milke sab solve karte hain 🚀
